steps.title: Connect owner to name
steps.content: The task asks how the Jules Falk Stradivarius got its name. The notes give the naming pattern: many surviving Stradivarius violins are named for previous owners, and this violin is named for Jules Falk.

steps.title: Reject partial facts
steps.content: A identifies Falk but not the naming pattern. B gives production and survival counts. C describes the maker and quality. The remaining option applies the owner-naming pattern to this violin. The answer is D.
